mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review (title, content, address, user_id, point, review_status) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{address}, #{userId}, #{point}, #{reviewStatus})

INSERT INTO review_attribute (review_id, type, content) VALUES
(#{reviewId}, #{type}, #{item})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.user_id, r.point, r.review_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, u.login_id, /* 서브쿼리를 사용하여 가장 먼저 등록된 인증 사진 하나만 가져옵니다 */ (SELECT f.file_path FROM file f JOIN certification c ON f.target_id = c.id WHERE c.review_id = r.id AND f.target_type = 'CERTIFICATION' LIMIT 1) AS filePath FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id}
SELECT id, review_id, type, content FROM review_attribute WHERE review_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM review WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND review_status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT r.id, r.title, r.content, r.address, r.user_id, u.login_id AS loginId, r.point, r.review_status, r.created_at, r.updated_at,
COALESCE( (SELECT f.file_path FROM file f WHERE f.target_id = r.id AND f.target_type = 'REVIEW_THUMB' LIMIT 1), (SELECT f.file_path FROM file f WHERE f.target_id = r.id AND f.target_type = 'REVIEW' LIMIT 1) ) AS filePath
FROM review r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.review_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 4

SELECT COUNT(id) FROM review
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE review_status = 'PENDING'

SELECT CONCAT( '[장점: ', IFNULL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(pa.content) FROM review_attribute pa WHERE pa.review_id = r.id AND pa.type = 'PRO'), '없음'), '] [단점: ', IFNULL((SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(ca.content) FROM review_attribute ca WHERE ca.review_id = r.id AND ca.type = 'CON'), '없음'), '] 리뷰 내용: ', r.content ) FROM review r WHERE r.address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{region}, '%') AND r.review_status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT id, title, content, address, user_id, point, review_status FROM review WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM certification WHERE certification_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO file (target_type, target_id, file_path) VALUES ('REVIEW_THUMB', #{targetId}, #{filePath})
